source: PC02 ACP Cases_2016_Onwards x PC01 applications. Primary: AppealRefNumber 6-digit -> ABPCASEID. Fallback (match_method=spatial_temporal): nearest same-authority application (ACP centroid <=55m) whose decision pre-dates the appeal; validated 98.4% vs Kerry ground truth.
caveat: ABP appeals are de novo; overturn = outcome flipped. ACP feed 2016+. Correlation/record, not a quality judgement.
